flashcards.title: Flashcards
flashcards.desc: Everyday English words with real example sentences.

taboo.title: Taboo Game
taboo.desc: Simple everyday words · describe without forbidden words!

heads_up.title: Heads Up
heads_up.desc: Hold the phone — friends describe, you guess.

charades.title: Charades
charades.desc: Act without speaking — your team guesses!

emoji_clues.title: Emoji Clues
emoji_clues.desc: Guess the Emoji style — combine emojis, find the English word!

games_hub.tip: The most fun way to learn with friends!
games_hub.deck_why: Each game has a different word count because the rules differ: Taboo needs forbidden-word lists, Charades needs mime-friendly words, Emoji Clues needs visual hints.

deck_notes.taboo: Word + 5 forbidden words you cannot say.
deck_notes.heads_up: Single word — friends read from the screen and describe.
deck_notes.charades: Mime-friendly verbs and objects — no speaking.
deck_notes.emoji_clues: 40 puzzles · 3 modes · 10 questions, 3 lives — classic emoji quiz.

games_hub.title: Classroom Games
games_hub.subtitle: Four word games to play with friends. Pick one and start!

taboo.title: Taboo
taboo.desc: Describe in English without forbidden words.

emoji_clues.title: Emoji Clues
emoji_clues.desc: Combine emojis left to right — find one English word.

grammar.intro: Read each rule and mark complete to earn XP.

exam.title: Level Exam
exam.intro: Pick a mode and start a {count}-question exam. Each mode uses different question styles.
exam.exit_confirm: Leave the exam? Your progress will not be saved.

mode_desc.mixed: A mix of all question types.
mode_desc.true_false: Mark each statement true or false.
mode_desc.tap: Quickly tap the correct option from two choices.
mode_desc.fill: Type the missing word in the sentence.
mode_desc.translate: Translate the Turkish sentence into English.

taboo.title: Taboo Game
taboo.subtitle: Everyday words everyone knows. Describe in English without forbidden words — perfect for classroom team play!

modes.practice_desc: No timer, hints and pronunciation support.
modes.party_desc: Two teams take turns with a live scoreboard.

taboo.no_cards_filter: No cards match this filter. Try a different category or difficulty.

rules.title: Taboo Rules
rules.r1: Describe the target word to your team in English.
rules.r2: You cannot use forbidden words or their root forms.
rules.r3: You cannot say or spell the target word directly.
rules.r4: If you say a forbidden word, opponents call 'Taboo!' — turn passes.
rules.r5: In timed mode, time out auto-skips the card.
rules.r6: In team mode, turns alternate after each card.

heads_up.title: Heads Up
heads_up.subtitle: Hold the phone facing your friends. They describe the word in English — you guess.
heads_up.how_1: One person holds the phone and does not look at the screen.
heads_up.how_2: Friends see the word and describe it in English.
heads_up.how_3: Got it? Green · Pass? Yellow · Round ends when time runs out.
heads_up.friends_describe: Your friends are describing this word
heads_up.tilt_hint: Large buttons — tap with your thumb

charades.title: Charades
charades.subtitle: Only you see the word. Act without speaking — your team guesses in English!
charades.how_1: One player holds the phone and sees the word.
charades.how_2: Mime and gesture — no talking allowed.
charades.how_3: Team guessed right? Green · Pass? Yellow.
charades.only_you_see: Only you can see this word

emoji_clues.title: Emoji Clues
emoji_clues.tagline: Combine the emojis → find one English word. (Guess the Emoji logic)
emoji_clues.rule_body: Read the emojis left to right. Each emoji is a clue. Together they point to a single English word. The Turkish meaning appears only after you answer.

picture.title: Picture Mode
picture.prompt: What word do these 2 emojis describe?
picture.hint: Tip: The emojis depict the thing itself.

combo.title: Combo Mode
combo.prompt: What word do these 3 emojis make together?
combo.hint: Tip: Think about each emoji in order.

chain.title: Story Mode
chain.prompt: What English word does this scene describe?
chain.hint: Tip: The emojis tell a situation or activity.

settings.title: Settings
settings.game_timers_hint: These defaults apply to all game setup screens.
settings.reset_confirm: All progress will be deleted. Are you sure?
